name: Flash of Heraldry
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>紋章の明滅</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>メダリオン・フラッシュ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target any number of face-up monsters your opponent controls; those monsters' names become "Unknown". During your End Phase, if you control a Psychic Xyz Monster and this card is in your GY: You can Set this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use this effect of "Flash of Heraldry" once per turn.
eff: Target any number of face-up monsters your opponent controls; those monsters' names become "Unknown". During your End Phase, if you control a Psychic Xyz Monster and this card is in your GY: You can Set this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use this effect of "Flash of Heraldry" once per turn.

banished: Banishes itself when it leaves the field
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
